parts:
That’s the **current local time in Singapore (SGT, UTC+8)**.  

Singapore doesn’t use daylight saving time, so it stays the same all year round. citeturn0search0

parts: what is current weather in Singapore?

content.text: search("what is current weather in Singapore?")

queries: Singapore weather today temperature humidity Singapore now

parts:
genuiP31s

Here’s the **current weather in Singapore**:

- 🌡️ Around **34–35°C** (very hot)  
- ☁️ **Partly cloudy / clouds and sun**  
- 💧 Humidity about **50%**, so it still feels hotter (~38°C) citeturn0search1  
- 🌬️ Light wind (~15 km/h) citeturn0search1  

**What it means:**  
It’s a typical hot and humid afternoon in Singapore. Even if it doesn’t look too sunny, the “feels like” temperature is high, so staying hydrated and avoiding long exposure outdoors is a good idea.

Also, this time of year (April), it’s common to get **afternoon thunderstorms**, so rain later in the day wouldn’t be surprising. citeturn0search5  

If you want, I can tell you whether it’s going to rain in your exact area in the next 1–2 hours.

children.$when: state.use_current && state.forecast.current != null || size(state.forecast.daily.filter(d, d.date_key == state.focus_date)) > 0

children.$value: state.use_current && state.forecast.current != null ? (state.unit == 'F' ? state.forecast.current.temperature.label_f + '°' : state.forecast.current.temperature.label_c + '°') : (state.unit == 'F' ? '' + round(state.forecast.daily.filter(d, d.date_key == state.focus_date)[0].high.fahrenheit) + '°' : '' + round(state.forecast.daily.filter(d, d.date_key == state.focus_date)[0].high.celsius) + '°')
children.$aria-label: state.use_current && state.forecast.current != null ? (state.unit == 'F' ? state.forecast.current.temperature.a11y_label_f : state.forecast.current.temperature.a11y_label_c) : (state.unit == 'F' ? state.forecast.daily.filter(d, d.date_key == state.focus_date)[0].high.a11y_label_f : state.forecast.daily.filter(d, d.date_key == state.focus_date)[0].high.a11y_label_c)

children.$data: state.forecast.hourly_chart != null ? state.forecast.hourly_chart.map(p, { "timestamp": p.timestamp, "temp_f": p.temp_f, "temp_c": p.temp_c, "precip": p.precip_chance, "_unit": state.unit, "formatted": (state.focus == 'precip' ? (p.precip_chance == null ? '-' : '' + p.precip_chance + '%') : (state.unit == 'F' ? '' + round(p.temp_f) + '°' : '' + round(p.temp_c) + '°')) }) : []
children.$scrollToValue: state.forecast.hourly_chart_today_key != null && state.forecast.hourly_chart_now_start != null && state.focus_date == state.forecast.hourly_chart_today_key ? state.forecast.hourly_chart_now_start : state.forecast.hourly_chart_day_start[state.focus_date]
